description:
You are a DevOps team lead managing infrastructure automation projects in OpenProject. Your team has decided to create a dedicated sub-project under 'DevOps Automation' to focus on hardening the CI/CD pipeline. Create a sub-project with the following details:
- Project name: 'CI/CD Pipeline Hardening'
- Identifier: 'cicd-pipeline-hardening'
- Parent project: 'DevOps Automation'
- Description: 'Dedicated workstream for improving CI/CD pipeline reliability, security scanning integration, and deployment rollback mechanisms.'
- Enabled modules: Work package tracking, Wiki

You are logged in as the administrator, starting from the 'DevOps Automation' project overview page.
